items.title: Italy's AGCM opens a probe into Apple under the DSA, saying rival cloud providers should get free iOS and iPadOS interoperability and iCloud-equivalent access (Cristina Carlevaro/Reuters)

items.title_zh: 意大利 AGCM 根据 DSA 对苹果展开调查，称竞争对手的云提供商应获得免费的 iOS 和 iPadOS 互操作性以及 iCloud 等效访问权限（Cristina Carlevaro/路透社）
items.title_bilingual: 意大利 AGCM 根据 DSA 对苹果展开调查，称竞争对手的云提供商应获得免费的 iOS 和 iPadOS 互操作性以及 iCloud 等效访问权限（Cristina Carlevaro/路透社） / Italy's AGCM opens a probe into Apple under the DSA, saying rival cloud providers should get free iOS and iPadOS interoperability and iCloud-equivalent access (Cristina Carlevaro/Reuters)

items.title: Indian AI startup Sarvam raised $234M in the first close of a $300M Series B at a $1.5B valuation, with HCLTech acquiring a 10.5% stake for ~$150M in cash (Urvi Dugar/Reuters)
items.title_original: Indian AI startup Sarvam raised $234M in the first close of a $300M Series B at a $1.5B valuation, with HCLTech acquiring a 10.5% stake for ~$150M in cash (Urvi Dugar/Reuters)
items.title_en: Indian AI startup Sarvam raised $234M in the first close of a $300M Series B at a $1.5B valuation, with HCLTech acquiring a 10.5% stake for ~$150M in cash (Urvi Dugar/Reuters)
items.title_zh: 印度人工智能初创公司 Sarvam 在 3 亿美元 B 轮融资的首轮融资中筹集了 2.34 亿美元，估值为 1.5 亿美元，HCLTech 以约 1.5 亿美元现金收购了 10.5% 的股份（Urvi Dugar/路透社）
items.title_bilingual: 印度人工智能初创公司 Sarvam 在 3 亿美元 B 轮融资的首轮融资中筹集了 2.34 亿美元，估值为 1.5 亿美元，HCLTech 以约 1.5 亿美元现金收购了 10.5% 的股份（Urvi Dugar/路透社） / Indian AI startup Sarvam raised $234M in the first close of a $300M Series B at a $1.5B valuation, with HCLTech acquiring a 10.5% stake for ~$150M in cash (Urvi Dugar/Reuters)

items.title_bilingual: 消息人士称，Anthropic 难以与特朗普政府进行有效沟通；一名官员表示，在未能“尊重”网络执行官后，它“把我们搞砸了” (Axios) / Sources say Anthropic struggles to communicate effectively with the Trump administration; an official says it "screwed us" after failing to "honor" a cyber EO (Axios)

items.title: Court reporting shows AI's limits in replacing human skill, as reporters remain crucial for capturing gestures and working through noise, amid a worker shortage (Allison Pohle/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_original: Court reporting shows AI's limits in replacing human skill, as reporters remain crucial for capturing gestures and working through noise, amid a worker shortage (Allison Pohle/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: Court reporting shows AI's limits in replacing human skill, as reporters remain crucial for capturing gestures and working through noise, amid a worker shortage (Allison Pohle/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 法庭报告显示人工智能在取代人类技能方面的局限性，因为在工人短缺的情况下，记者对于捕捉手势和在噪音中工作仍然至关重要（Allison Pohle/华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: 法庭报告显示人工智能在取代人类技能方面的局限性，因为在工人短缺的情况下，记者对于捕捉手势和在噪音中工作仍然至关重要（Allison Pohle/华尔街日报） / Court reporting shows AI's limits in replacing human skill, as reporters remain crucial for capturing gestures and working through noise, amid a worker shortage (Allison Pohle/Wall Street Journal)
